valentines
Romance, Wood Fired
This Valentine's, settle in. Four wood-fired courses, a champagne toast, and a table that invites you to stay awhile. $115 per person.
Ecco Buckhead
Make a Reservation
Ecco Midtown
Make A Reservation
A Weekend Built for Friends
Celebrate Galentine's the right way—with four wood-fired courses, a champagne toast, and no reason to rush the night. $115  for the full experience.
Want to keep the weekend going? Join us Sunday at your own speed—we'll be open, ready with familiar flavors and an easy welcome.
